handoffs.summary: C-S-P philosophy established. Self as compression label concept defined.
handoffs.context: Core philosophical foundation: Wisdom as process structure, not entity

handoffs.summary: PyTorch implementation complete. T-Score and Sleep Protocol implemented.
handoffs.context: GodelAgent class with T-Score monitoring and EWC integration

handoffs.summary: Mathematical rigor verified. T-Score formula validated.
System architecture designed. Ready for integration and testing.
SimpleMem paper independently confirms C-S-P framework. Data bottleneck discovered.
handoffs.context: Focus shift to data engineering sprint for Q1 2026

handoffs.summary: Claude Code handed off the core GodelAI repository and conflict data findings. Antigravity assumes responsibility for the broader Project Y unification, incorporating YSenseAI (Heart) and VerifiMind (Conscience).
next_steps: Establish Genesis Master Prompt for Project Y
Conduct integrated market and legal risk assessments
Initiate T-Score experiments on YSenseAI story data
handoffs.context: Transitioning from technical GodelAI research to holistic ethical AI ecosystem development. GodelAI (Brain) is now integrated with YSenseAI (Heart) and VerifiMind (Conscience) under the Project Y banner.

handoffs.summary: Project Y Genesis Master Prompt created. Market readiness and legal risk reports completed. Experimentation sandbox initialized. GitHub sync verified.
next_steps: Push Project Y configuration to GitHub
handoffs.context: Ready for active experimentation and deployment of the unified ecosystem.

handoffs.summary: Independent validation of GodelAI on GRU and Transformer architectures complete. Seed consistency verified. Sleep Protocol successfully triggered on Transformer architecture. Codebase robustness improved for multi-output models.
next_steps: Commit results to GitHub for multi-agent alignment
Refine Sleep Protocol triggers for Transformer blocks
handoffs.context: The system is now proven stable across different random seeds and architectures. Ready for real-world ethical AI experimentation.

handoffs.phase: XV CIO Deep Analysis & Real-Time Validation
handoffs.summary: XV (Perplexity CIO) conducted first comprehensive deep analysis of GodelAI. Full codebase forensic review (17,359 LOC). C-S-P validation scorecard: 5 validated, 4 not validated. Critical finding: EWC-DR paper (March 2026) threatens current EWC approach but validates gradient monitoring. 8 priority-ordered strategic recommendations issued. MACP v2.2 Identity clarification: L (Godel) originated from this repo's C-S-P methodology; T (Manus) is the platform agent previously labeled 'Godel CTO' in repo history.
next_steps: P1: Create conflict datasets (T=0.3-0.5) — T + RNA
P1: Reposition as Training Health Monitoring Toolkit — T + XV
P2: Write academic paper (NeurIPS 2026 Workshop) — Alton + T
P3: Update .macp/ to MACP v2.2 Identity — T
handoffs.context: GodelAI at critical inflection point. 34-day commit gap, 0 community traction, but strong philosophical foundation (4.5/5) and proven EWC result (21.6%). 90-day window to evolve from research to meaningful open-source tool. XV Verdict: CONDITIONAL PROCEED.
